ul.li: Column j: Saliency of Input Bit $j$
Function: Linearly maps $h$ independent sub-spaces back into $d_{model}$

div.p: W_O effectively performs a weighted sum: $O = \sum (Head_i \times Weight_{learned})$

ol.li: Rotation: Re-align sub-spaces to model base

g.text: Without W_O, heads remain isolated islands of information. W_O is the bridge that enables cross-head communication and global context synthesis.
